creator: glen@broadpool.com
text:
I approve. Thanks.

On Apr 13, 2009, at 12:02 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of www/siteframe,
>
> Please note that PR ports/133692 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133692
